title: Clint Bajakian
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Cleanup|Requires citations and following the [[Wookieepedia:Layout Guide/Out-of-universe|out-of-universe layout guide]] for real-world person articles}}
[[File:Clint Bajakian-The Adventurer 9.jpg|200px|thumb|Clint Bajakian]]
'''Clint Bajakian''' (born [[October 31]], [[1960s#1962|1962]]) is a musician, composer and sound designer of [[Star Wars video games|video game]]s. He also provided voices for some game characters, including [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]].

==Biography==
Bajakian is a classically trained musician, having studied guitar and piano, and graduated from the [[Wikipedia:University of Michigan|University of Michigan]] with a Masters of Arts for composition, focusing on orchestra and instrumental ensembles.<ref name="guide" /> He also has a a classical guitar degree from the [[Wikipedia:New England Conservatory of Music|New England Conservatory of Music]]. During his studies, the university orchestra performed one of his instrumental compositions.<ref name="dig">Jo Ashburn, ''The Dig Official Player's Guide''</ref> 

Bajackian served as music director at a [[Wikipedia:Boston Symphony Orchestra|Boston Symphony Orchestra]]-affiliated art camp.<ref name="dig" /> As a sound designer, Bajakian compiled his own collection of recorded sound effects which he utilized in games.<ref name="guide">''[[Dark Forces Official Player's Guide]]''</ref>

Bajakian joined ''LucasArts'' in [[1991]]. He created the sound effects for ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing]]'', and both the sound effects and some music for [[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] and ''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]''.<ref name="dig" />

He worked as Sound Editing and Processing Engineer during the production of ''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault]]'', working with [[Michael Land]] and [[Peter McConnell]]. Among other things, he edited the voice acting (in 16-bit resolution), broke the lines down, and equalized them to sound clear. He also added some effects, such as voice over radio chatter, "by narrowing the bandwidth in the middle to high end".<ref>''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault: The Official Insider's Guide]]''</ref>

For ''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]'' he composed the musical score, designed all sound effects, and processed voice acting from his studio in San Rafael.<ref name="guide" />

Bajakian also worked as a voice actor in video games, such as voicing [[Boorka]] in ''[[Galactic Battlegrounds]]''.
